summary:
SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND HUMAN FREE WILL: Brandon explains that believers are engaged in a spiritual battle against principalities and powers rather than flesh and blood, requiring specific prayer strategies against abusive individuals like bosses or spouses. Brandon emphasizes the importance of taking authority over the demonic spirits maneuvering inside these abusers rather than praying against the individuals themselves, as interfering with human free will borders on witchcraft. By commanding these dark forces to cease and desist, believers can invoke peace over their situations without inappropriately attempting to manipulate the emotions or decisions of others.

ETHICAL BUSINESS PRAYERS AND PROSPERITY: Brandon applies the principle of respecting free will to the realm of business and sales, warning that trying to spiritually coerce customers into buying products is a form of manipulation. Instead, Brandon advises praying directly over the products so that they stand out and become desirable to potential buyers. By declaring biblical blessings, such as those found in Deuteronomy 28, Brandon demonstrates how to seek divine favor and prosperity ethically, ensuring that one's business endeavors are blessed without violating the spiritual boundaries of other people.

INTERCEDING FOR UNSAVED AND ADDICTED LOVED ONES: Brandon provides a comprehensive approach for praying over unsaved family members who are trapped in destructive lifestyles, such as drug addiction or alcoholism. Brandon instructs believers to bind the specific spirits of addiction and command them to release their hold, while simultaneously asking God to send laborers, angels, and unexpected encounters to minister to the wayward individuals. Furthermore, Brandon encourages praying for profound spiritual convictions to strike them even in places like bars, believing that God can orchestrate supernatural interventions and dreams to bring about their salvation and safe return home.

FAITH FOR HEALING AND STRATEGIC FINANCIAL SOWING: Brandon emphasizes the necessity of aligning one's words with biblical promises to manifest healing and financial provision, citing scriptures to assert that physical healing has already been accomplished through divine stripes. Alongside declaring health, Brandon discusses the importance of strategic financial giving to achieve a maximum return on sown seeds, noting that different ministries represent varying qualities of spiritual soil. Brandon specifically identifies organizations that support orphans, widows, and the salvation of Jewish people as highly fertile ground, advocating for the continuous blessing and honoring of Israel to secure divine favor regardless of political or behavioral disagreements.

HARNESSING SPOKEN FAITH AND BREAKING GENERATIONAL CURSES: Brandon highlights the immense power of the tongue, warning that speaking words of doubt, fear, or complaint will manifest negative realities and hinder spiritual progress. To combat this, Brandon urges believers to immerse themselves in scripture to build unwavering faith, replacing worry with the joy and peace that accompany true belief. This vocalized faith is essential for breaking inherited generational curses and spiritual strongholds, such as familial patterns of disease, sexual perversion, or eating disorders, which Brandon personally battles by actively renewing his mind and verbally declaring freedom from the spirit of obesity.

DELIVERANCE FROM VICES AND PERSONAL ADDICTIONS: Brandon shares personal triumphs over alcohol dependency and advocates for a lifestyle entirely free from worldly vices to maintain a pure spiritual witness. Recounting a powerful testimony, Brandon describes praying over a young churchgoer heavily addicted to cigarettes, resulting in the boy experiencing severe physical nausea upon attempting to smoke again, thereby achieving complete deliverance. Brandon asserts that God is infinitely merciful, encouraging anyone struggling with addictions to pornography or hard drugs to run toward God for deliverance rather than hiding in shame, using specific scriptures to consistently command the release of these lustful and addictive spirits.

SANCTIFYING AND PROTECTING THE HOME ENVIRONMENT: Brandon addresses the necessity of guarding the spiritual atmosphere of the household against demonic influences often brought in through secular media, such as heavy metal music. To protect the home, Brandon recommends physically anointing rooms and doorposts with olive oil while declaring protective boundaries, drawing a parallel to the Israelites applying blood to their doors. Furthermore, Brandon insists on enforcing strict household rules regarding worldly media, advising parents to demand that compromising content be restricted or removed entirely, even if it means asking unyielding older children to move out in order to preserve a home completely dedicated to serving the Lord against the pervasive agendas of modern media.

VISION OF DIVINE PROVISION AND COMPREHENSIVE BLESSING: Brandon shares a spiritual vision of a mother bird feeding a nest of chirping chicks, representing the myriad of needs and cries for help from believers. In this revelation, Brandon learns that it is the role of the Holy Spirit to miraculously meet these overwhelming demands, bringing divine nourishment directly to where people are stationed. Concluding with a powerful and comprehensive prayer, Brandon calls forth immediate physical healing, deliverance from demonic oppression, the restoration of struggling marriages, and abundant financial blessings over the lives and homes of all those seeking assistance.
rawData: [July 30, 2023]-[Spiritual warfare against demonic strongholds and addictions]-[https://youtu.be/EJ3Rtm3uJQw]-[People were wondering about prayer cues and things like that. They want to know some more things, so I'm going to give you a couple right here. Okay, in Ephesians it talks about how we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities and powers, and there's a lot more to the verse. But for time's sake, there you go. It's Ephesians 4:16, I believe, somewhere around there. You cannot pray against somebody's will. Okay, like say you go to work and your boss is really mean to you. Maybe you're a teenager right now and you're watching me, and you are in a verbally abusive relationship with your parents. When you are being assaulted like that, it is a demonic presence behind it, and so you take authority over the devil. This is how I would do it. I had a boss that was not very nice to me, and he treated me pretty poorly. So every day I would drive to work and say, 'I bind the maneuvering of any demonic spirits in so-and-so, and you will not torment me in any way today at all. I take authority over the spirits that maneuver inside of him, and I command them to stop right now. You have no right, no power, no authority, and I bind you up, and you are not able to maneuver and torment in any way in the name of Jesus.' Concerning abuse, I bind the devils that are tormenting my husband or my wife. I bind that devil in the name of Jesus. I command you to cease and desist in your maneuvering, and I command you to stop it right now. You will not maneuver in them anymore. I command you to stop this, and I call peace to the spouse, or whoever, in the name of Jesus. I call peace over them, and that's how I pray. I don't bind them. You can't bind them because they have free will, okay? And you get into some kind of witchcraft sometimes when you start doing that, praying over their emotions. It's like when I'm trying to sell something in my business or whatever. I don't pray over that person, 'Father, I thank you that you cause them to buy my product.' Okay? I say this: 'Father, I thank you that my product stands out. Father, I thank you that my product is desirable, that people want what I'm selling. I thank you, Father, that I am blessed in the city and the field, coming in and going out, according to Deuteronomy 28. And Father, I thank you that when people see my stuff and what I'm selling today, they want what I have because it stands out.' But I don't pray over their emotions manipulating them. You don't manipulate people in the spirit realm. It's part of witchcraft, okay? You don't do that. You just pray over your stuff. You pray, 'Father, my stuff is going to stand out. Thank you, Lord.' And Father, when it comes to your unsaved loved ones, if they're out drinking or partying or being promiscuous or whatever: 'Father, I thank you for Johnny, or whoever. I thank you, Father, that he is saved. Father, I thank you, Lord, right now that you send laborers across his path, whether they're at Walmart or wherever. Let somebody come across his path and witness to him today. Now, Father, I thank you. I bind the spirit of addiction off of his life. I take authority over alcoholism. I take authority over drug addiction.' He may be strung out on meth or prescription pills. 'I bind the spirit of addiction off of his life right now in the name of Jesus. I call that spirit to cease and desist in its maneuvering in his life. I command it to bow its knee. You have no authority to torment him anymore. You're a foul devil, and I command you to release him right now in the name of Jesus. If they're wayward now, angels, I send you out. Go and bring Johnny, or whoever, home to me. Bring them home. Father, I thank you, Holy Spirit, you're working on their hearts right now. I call them to have a heart that's pliable. Oh God, I minister to them right now.' There it goes, it started hitting me in the intercession. Hallelujah. 'Okay, I pray over their heart right now in the name of Jesus. Call him in, bring them in. Lord, I thank you. Lord, we're not giving up on them. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you're sending them angels right now. Minister to my children. Father, I thank you, Lord, that if they're in the bar right now, I thank you, Lord, that there is a conviction over their heart to get out of that bar right now in the name of Jesus. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you're going to save their soul. Lord, I thank you, Lord, you bring forth the harvest right now over my son. Father, that you would visit him in the midnight hour in a dream. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you would send an angel to minister to him. Father, I thank you, Lord, it may be an angel that they don't even know, an angel unaware. It could be a hitchhiker, I don't know whoever, that finally walks up to him and says boom, and the power of God moves on him in a supernatural way.' We don't know, but I know this: that God is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think, according to the power that works in you. Okay, He's already done it all, folks. He's already done it all. He's already done everything He can do for your healing. You've got to stay in agreement with what He's already done in His Word. First Peter 2:24, 'By His stripes we are healed.' He was wounded for our transgressions, He was bruised for our iniquities, the chastisement of our peace was upon Him, and with His stripes we are healed, period. And we stand on that. We get in the Word, and we quote the Word out of our mouth: 'Father, I thank you, Lord, that you provide all my needs according to your riches in glory in Christ Jesus. I thank you, Lord, that I'm a tither, I'm a giver, I'm a sower, I'm a believer. And Father, you said you would take care of me. You said you would never see the righteous forsaken, nor his seed begging bread. And Father, if you take care of the birds of the air and the lilies, how much more am I to you? How much more, God? And Father, I thank you, Lord, that you're going to take care of my family, my children, my wife. You're going to provide for us today. I thank you, Lord, that you give me a creative idea to get wealth. I seek you, Father. I seek your provision for my house. I seek you, God, because you said you take care of us. Father, I'm a giver. I thank you, Lord, that you're going to provide for us. I thank you, Lord, that the seeds that I've sown are going to bring forth some thirty, some sixty, and a hundredfold.' I've always asked that: why some thirty, some sixty, and some a hundred? How do I get a hundredfold every time, Lord, whenever I sacrificially give? And the Lord said, 'It's the ground you're sowing in, son. Some ground is miracle-working ground, and some ground is not as rich as others. So you've got to be a good student of where I tell you to give your money.' And I ask Him, I said, 'Lord, show me where the hundredfold ground is. Show me where the 60-fold ground is. Not that I'm not grateful for the thirtyfold, but Lord, I know that you're exceedingly abundantly above all that I dare ask or think. And so, Father, I thank you, Lord, that you teach me how to sow into the good ground.' And I found a lot of times, blessing Israel ministries, ministries trying to get the Jewish people saved, ministries trying to get the little orphans saved—protecting the orphans, the widows' ministries, things like that—they're real good soil. Because that's what Jesus commissioned us to do: to take care of the orphan and the widow. Jesus told us that those who bless Israel, I will bless, and those that curse Israel, I will curse. So I'm going to be on the side of the blessing. I want to be on the side that says, 'Lord, I bless Israel.' Even if I don't always agree with what they do and how they live their life, because there is a lot of sin with a lot of Jewish people. But Father, I'm going to honor them. I honor them, and I pray for them. We don't talk bad about them. We just pray, 'Thank you, Lord, that you protect Netanyahu, and you protect the parliament and the people that are over that area. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that they're going to have a saving knowledge of Jesus.' I just pray over that kind of stuff. That's the way you should be. Speak blessing, speak increase. Your mountain needs to hear your voice in your life. If you're not calling those things that be not as though they were, you need to be speaking to your circumstances. You have what you say. Your tongue is powerful. If you're speaking cursing out of your mouth, and speaking doubt and unbelief—'Oh well, I'm sick today again. I've got a bad day. Oh yeah, well, my boss is treating me like trash again. Oh, my kids are acting up again, boy, he is a real devil'—you're going to get what you say. You are decreeing those things out of your mouth. Manifestation is going to start happening, because life and death are in the power of the tongue. Remember that. You want to know if you're in the faith for what you're believing for? Joy and peace are going to be following you. You need to be walking in joy and peace. If you're in worry, doubt, and unbelief, you're not in faith. If you're in a spirit of worry and you're in fear, fear is not faith. Faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the Word of God. You've got to get in the Word, and you've got to get the Word concerning your circumstances. You've got to find scripture concerning your healing, concerning what you're believing for, because faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the Word. You've got to get that faith inside of you. Perfect love casteth out all fear, and fear has torment, okay? So you've got to get these words in there. He that feareth is not made perfect in love, and you've got to know that. I believe it's in First John somewhere. When I'm quoting these scriptures to you, you can use your Bible app and type them in there to help you. I'm sorry, it's hard for me to memorize the street addresses; I just memorize the words. Getting faith down inside of you: Mark 11:23 and verse 24. Quote that, and know if you pray and you don't doubt, you're going to get your harvest. Whatsoever things you desire when you pray, believe that you receive them, and you shall have them. And if you say unto the mountain, 'Be thou removed, and be thou cast into the sea, and shall not doubt in your heart, you shall have whatsoever things you say.' I believe I got it that time. So this is the foundation of what I'm trying to say. When you're praying, and you're binding things, whatsoever things you bind on earth are bound in heaven, and whatsoever things you loose on earth are loosed in heaven. You've got to bind these devils up. You've got to break off the strongholds in your life, okay? Whenever you say, 'Okay, well, this is another for instance. Grandpa had cancer, his dad had cancer, and his dad's dad had cancer.' That's generational. You've got generational diabetes. You've got generational eating disorders. You've got generational strongholds of sexual perversion. 'Well, you know, Grandpa cheated on his wife, and his dad cheated on his wife, and Daddy cheated on his wife, and it just keeps going on down the line. I pray I don't cheat on mine.' It's a generational curse, and you've got to come against that and say, 'That stops with me. That stops with my generation. That's not going on to my kids. I'm not going to live in that.' So you've got to stand against what's called a spiritual stronghold. You've got to break strongholds off of your life by prayer and fasting, for one, and you need to get in the Word concerning this and start attacking it. I attack what I overcome. I attack eating disorders, eating for comfort, eating for pleasure. Because you find that, 'Well, I like to go out and eat a steak at Outback.' I love to go to Outback. I love to go eat the steaks. I love to go get potatoes, and I like to get the salads, and I like to celebrate. I celebrate food, and it's the way I was raised. So it's generational. My mom's overweight, my grandmother was overweight when she died, and everybody has a generational thing of eating because it was just the way we were raised. Now I'm breaking that. I keep coming against it. 'I will not have an eating disorder of obesity anymore in my life. I take authority over obesity in Jesus' name. I am free from the spirit of eating disorders. I take authority over this now. Father, I thank you, Lord, your Word says that you've given me a spirit of self-control. And I come against the spirit of eating disorders. I thank you, Lord, that I operate in the fruit of the Spirit, of self-control today.' I say that over myself all the time. I have an unbelievable God, and today I've done pretty good, but I keep standing. I keep standing, and I keep telling my kids, 'You're not going to have this. I'm breaking the cycle. I'm breaking this cycle off of your life. We're not going to live this way anymore. Food is to keep us alive; it's not something I have to have to celebrate all the time. Food is a source of energy.' That's what I tell myself. I have to renew my mind. It's something I'm telling you all that I struggle with, okay? It's just being real with you. I'm free from eating disorders in Jesus' name. I'm free from—you know, I used to drink too much alcohol. I'm not going to drink alcohol ever again. I've said that, and I broke that cycle. It took a while, but now it broke off of my life, and I don't touch alcohol anymore. For years, when I was first in my twenties, it was something that was a vice for me: getting a beer, drinking a beer, having too much of a margarita, going out and having a margarita at a Mexican restaurant. I said, 'No, I'm not going to live that way anymore. I want to be a light.' Drinking alcohol is not a light. I don't want to be that. If I'm sitting there and have booze all on my breath, and somebody walks up to me and says, 'I've seen you at church, can you pray for me?' 'Oh yeah, brother,' and you have alcohol on your breath and you go lay hands on them, it's not a good witness. So don't do it. I want to be a vessel that can be used by Jesus, and I don't want any vices. I don't want any vices. Some people think it's okay to drink socially, but some people don't. I'm one that says it's not a good thing to do. It's just me. I want to walk in the glory, and I don't want anything from the world. If the world says it's okay, I don't want a part of it. If they say it's okay to watch R-rated movies and do all that, it's not okay for me. What they say is okay is not okay. That's not our standard. Our standard is the Word of God. We get in the Word of God, and we see what the Word of God says, and the Bible says not to be drunk with excess. So we need to walk in the light and be a light in this world. If you have an addiction to cigarettes, we're not going to condemn you for smoking cigarettes, but I'm going to tell you this: we're going to pray that you're set free from cigarettes. There was this young boy when I was at the church working there. He had a really bad problem with smoking cigarettes, and he would be outside smoking at church. I told him, I said, 'You want to get free from that?' He goes, 'Man, I want to get free so bad, but I'm so addicted to cigarettes. I smoke four packs a day or more. It costs me so much money, it costs me a lot out of my paycheck.' So I told him, 'Well, let's just pray right now.' He said, 'Okay.' So he dropped his cigarette down in the street, raised his hands, and I laid hands on his stomach and said, 'In the name of Jesus, Father, I thank you, Lord, that this is repulsive to him. I say in the name of Jesus that he will not want this or desire it anymore. We bind the spirit of addiction. We command it to go from his body. We speak to the nicotine to dry out in his body right now. We command it to go from his body. We thank you, Lord, that we break all spirits of cravings for nicotine, and we call him delivered from this in the name of Jesus. And Father, I thank you that the next time he tries to put a cigarette up to his mouth, it would make him nauseous and want to throw up.' Well, church was over, he went home, and he came back to me on Wednesday night service—this was Sunday night church. He came back to me on Wednesday night service and said, 'Man, I got home and I broke out in a massive sweat when I went to go light up that cigarette. I got so sick whenever I tried to put that cigarette up and smoke it. I couldn't even do it. I started to throw up.' He said, 'Your prayer worked. I have been delivered from cigarettes ever since you prayed.' So that's just a ministry for me. I pray for people who have an addiction to cigarettes, and Jesus has set you free from it. You don't have to be bound by cigarettes anymore. But you don't want the devil to tell you, 'Well, you're a no-good so-and-so because you smoke cigarettes. You're a no-good so-and-so because you smoke dope or crack or whatever.' Tell the devil to shut up. We don't run from God when we sin; we run to Him. If we are messing up, we don't say, 'Well, we've got to hide ourselves like Adam and Eve did.' No, we run to Him. He is merciful. We can run to Him. He is our Father, and He is our deliverer. Find scripture pertaining to what you need in your life concerning your addiction. There are a lot of good Bible apps that will help you with addictions. Find those scriptures, and every time you go up to light that crack pipe or smoke something bad, quote those scriptures out of your mouth and say, 'I am delivered from this in Jesus' name. I am delivered from nicotine. I am delivered from marijuana. I am delivered from crack or snorting coke or whatever you may have a vice on—heroin, meth, whatever.' Jesus wants you free from that. You don't have to be bound by it. If you have a problem with pornography, tell your spouse, of course, and tell them, 'I need to be free.' Every time you have that temptation to try to look at something dirty, pray, 'God, I command the spirit of lust to be bound off my life. I bind the maneuvering of that spirit in the name of Jesus. I command you to release me now. I am not going to look at trash on the internet or go to strip clubs.' Father, I thank you that you're free from that. You don't have to be bound by devils. You don't have to walk in bondage. Jesus wants to set you free. There was one lady in the comment section just tonight that said, 'Will you teach me how to anoint my house with oil? My son has a very bad addiction to listening to heavy metal.' That is a demonic spirit. There is a lot of demonic, satanic influence behind heavy metal—well, basically any secular music. Satan is very good at producing music; that's what he did. So start anointing your son's room. I take the olive oil, dip my finger in it, and apply it, just like the children of Israel applied the blood to the doorposts so that the death angel could not come in and destroy them. You apply the blood on your door and say, 'In the name of Jesus, I put the bloodline over my house, on my door, and over my son's bed, and I thank you, Lord, that you're bringing deliverance to him.' And you might have to put your foot down and say, 'Listen, I don't want you to listen to that stuff loud in my house. If you're going to listen to that trash, put it in a headset and put it on your ears, but you're not going to play it in my house and change the atmosphere of my home. I love you, Johnny, or whatever your name is, but you're not going to change the atmosphere in my home.' If they're old enough, you might just need to tell them to move out. Say, 'I'm sorry, but we're going to have a house that worships the Lord in here, and you're not bringing your demons into my home.' It might come to the point where you say, 'You know what? I love you, but it's time for you to hit the road, buddy. Find yourself a place if that's the way you're going to live.' As for me and my house, we're going to serve the Lord, and we're not going to have that in my house. We're coming to a time, I'm telling you, you better have your line drawn on what you stand for, because if you don't, the devil's going to run you over. The media is trying to push their agenda on us with all the trash we get from CNN, or even Fox, MSNBC—they're trying to push their agenda on us, from Facebook all the way down. Like I told you, these are bad, evil places, and they try to influence your thinking, saying it's okay, a little bit at a time. Thank you so much for joining me for this long. If you're still watching, God bless you guys. I pray you're hungry. I could talk all day long, y'all. I've got so much going on inside of me to help you. Ask more questions below in the comment section here. What's on your heart? What do you need help with? I will find scriptures and tell you how I pray to get people free. So Father, I thank you right now in the name of Jesus. I'm going to do a blanket prayer for all the people that have asked for help, all the prayer needs, all the healings, and the people dying of a disease, or whose loved ones are far away from the Lord. Father, we thank you, Lord. You showed me in a vision today, Lord, little birds. I said, 'Father, they're like little birds chirping in a mama's nest, and they're asking for help, help, help, cheep, cheep, cheep.' I saw them in the Spirit, Lord, and I said, 'God, there are so many mouths to feed. I can't do it all, I don't know what you want me to do.' And you said to me, 'It's my job, Brandon. The Holy Spirit will take care of this.' And I saw that big bird dump a whole bunch of worms on those little babies. Today I pray that for you. The Holy Spirit is going to meet every need you have, right where you're at. Jesus has got this for you. I call healing over your bodies. I call deliverance over you in Jesus' name. I call restoration over your marriages. You may be having marriage problems; I call restoration over your marriages in Jesus' name. I call blessing over your home in Jesus' name financially. I pray that the Lord will bless you and keep you, may His face shine upon you and be gracious to you, and give you peace. I call those blessings over your home in Jesus' name. We praise the Lord for everything He's already done and what He continues to do in your life in the name of Jesus. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you, and I love you, and I'm so thankful that you're part of my family here. God bless you all. Bye-bye.]
